LEAD GEN AD FORMATS
Facebook has made it so easy for lead gen businesses to drive traffic and leads for
their business. Below are some of the most common ad formats available to you and
how to set these up - don't get overwhelmed by these and only roll these out once
you've completed the rapid fire testing!
